title: EFO SHM Doctors Set for Kids, Wooden 34-piece Kids Doctors Kit, with Real Stethoscope Portable Doctors Bag and Wooden Syringe, Role Play Toys for 3 4 5 6 Year Old Girls and Boys
features: 【34-Piece Kids Doctors Kit】Equip your child with essential medical tools including a stethoscope that can make real heartbeats, blood pressure cuff, thermometer, oxygen bottle, syringe, bandages, and other diagnostic and treatment first aid essentials. Doctor set for toddlers 3-5 also includes a doctor costume and a convenient tote bag for easy storage and portability, And assembled in a beautiful Gift Packaging Box, suitable for gifting

【Educational Kids Doctor Set】Foster your child's imagination, empathy, and bravery with the EFO SHM children doctors set. This engaging role play toys teaches children about medical tools and body parts, reducing anxiety and fear associated with doctor visits.

【Safe and Non-Toxic】This doctors set for kids age 3 is made of durable ABS plastic, ensuring it is non-toxic, BPA-free, and odor-free. The tools are designed with no sharp edges, providing a safe and secure play experience for young children.

【Portable and Easy to Store】The doctors set for kids comes with a spacious storage bag, making it convenient for storage and travel purposes.Teach your child the importance of organizing and help cultivate children's awareness of storing toys.

🎁【Ideal Gift for Toddlers】This doctor kit is a perfect gift for various occasions such as parties, pretend play, kids role play, class rewards, holiday toy gifts, stocking stuffers, and birthdays. Playing with the EFO SHM doctor set helps children learn about doctors and alleviates their fear of medical visits.
description: Product Description Kids Doctor Sets Interesting Educational Toy Overcome Medical Fears Promote Social Interaction Increase Sense of Responsibility Role Play Toys Encourage your children to put down their electronic devices and enjoy pretend play. Children's doctors bag are a great helper to familiarize your children with a variety of commonly used medical supplies. Real Stethoscope Toy: Comes with a real kids stethoscope, simulated forehead thermometer, and more. No Sharp Edges: The wooden doctors set for kids are made of natural high-quality wood, which has been polished many times to have smooth and rounded edges without sharp corners or burrs, ensuring children's safety when playing. The Children Doctors Set is 100% certified safe and does not contain any harmful chemicals. High Quality: Some doctor toy accessories are made of stainless steel, which is sturdy and durable and not easy to be damaged. Diverse Ways to Play: A variety of accessories can simulate various medical scenarios such as colds, fevers, injured by fall, etc. Fun Interaction: Play this doctor toys with your family to learn about the human body and medical equipment in an interesting way, enhance parent-child interaction, and spend quality time together. Encourage Communication and Expression: Doctor role play toys encourages children to practice communication and expression skills. Education through Fun: Through simulated medical treatment, children can develop their awareness of how to stay healthy and live a healthy life. Washable nylon children's doctor bag, can be reused after washing. Equipped with 1 handle and 1 shoulder strap, it can be used at home or taken with you on the go. Children's Doctor Bag Dimensions: 24 x 16 x 16 cm (9.5 x 6.3 x 6.3 inches). The EFO SHM toddler doctor playset makes a great gift for every occasion: children's birthdays, role play, classroom rewards, Christmas, Halloween, Children's Day and more. Reduce the Anxiety of Medical Visits: Toy versions of medical devices are fun. Familiarizing children with real-life doctor visits can help ease their anxiety about doctor visits and injections.
